description: A question/answer pair an LLM distilled from a support conversation, pending human review before it is written back into a knowledge base.
semantic_description: A candidate FAQ entry extracted from a customer-service conversation. Carries the proposed question and answer, the model's confidence, and a link back to the conversation it came from. A reviewer approves, edits or rejects it; approved candidates are published into a knowledge base and become retrievable by the agent.

description: Metadata-only view over ab_im_conversation, so the FAQ console can browse conversations and distil one. Read through GET /api/faq/conversations; nothing is ever written back to the conversation.
semantic_description: A support conversation that FAQ pairs can be distilled from. Carries how many candidates it has already produced, so a reviewer can see what has and has not been mined.
lifecycle_description: read-only; the only action is to distil FAQ candidates from it
